Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The ByteSizePerElementFromFormat method returns the byte size of each image element for the specified data format.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: constexpr static size_t ByteSizePerElementFromFormat(SourceDataFormat dataFormat); constexpr static size_t ByteSizePerElementFromFormat(DataFormat dataFormat);

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: The byte size of one scalar element of the specified data format.
